name: Ken's East Bay Hotel Corn Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a Dutch oven until crisp; drain and set aside.
2. Cook onion in bacon drippings and oil until tender.
3. Add potatoes, 2 cups chicken broth, carrots, salt, and pepper to the pot. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and add cream corn and celery. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes until vegetables are tender.
5. In a bowl, combine 1 cup chicken broth, flour, and cornstarch. Add this mixture to the pot and cook until thickened.
6. Stir in milk. Heat without boiling.
7. Serve in bowls topped with bacon and parsley. Serves 8-10.
